findings.issue: Inconsistent zh surface for 'システム方式設計'
zh surface deviates from glossary canonical
leaf_count=2 but only 1 entity in file (block_0 missing from export); stage6_verdict=WARN
zh surface retains Japanese '要件' (要件) instead of Chinese equivalent '需求' or '要求'
findings.expected: 组织及环境需求 or 组织及环境要求

findings.issue: Wrong-script character in zh: '確定' uses Japanese kanji '確' instead of Simplified Chinese '确'
findings.jp: 共通フレームの5つのプロセスのうちの「開発プロセス」のうちの1つ。システム要件のうちのソフトウェア要件を決める
findings.zh: 共通框架五大过程中「开発过程」之一，確定系统需求中的软件需求
findings.expected: 确定系统需求中的软件需求 (simplified 确, not 確)

findings.issue: Wrong-script character in zh: '开発' uses Japanese '発' instead of Simplified Chinese '发'; should be '开发'
findings.zh: 共通框架五大过程中「开発过程」之一，確定系统需求中的软件需求
findings.expected: 共通框架五大过程中「开发过程」之一，确定系统需求中的软件需求

findings.issue: zh surface '系统方式設計' contains Japanese kanji '設計' instead of Simplified Chinese '设计'
zh definition contains Japanese-script '開発' (should be Simplified '开发'); also '软件需求定义' in definition is redundant phrasing
findings.jp: 共通フレームの5つのプロセスのうちの「開発プロセス」のうちの1つ。システム要件のうちのソフトウェア要件を決める
findings.zh: 共通框架五大过程中「開発过程」之一。用于确定系统要求中的软件需求定义。
findings.expected: 共通框架五大过程中「开发过程」之一。用于确定系统需求中的软件需求。

findings.issue: Abbreviated definition uses '役割' (role) instead of '要件' (requirement), changing meaning; p236::2 has the fuller, accurate definition
findings.jp: 業務要件のうち、システムで実現する役割のこと
findings.zh: 业务需求中，由系统实现的职能部分。
findings.en: The roles within business requirements that are to be implemented by the system.
findings.expected: 業務要件のうちのシステムで実現する要件であり、具体的には、システムに必要な機能や性能

summary: chunk_22 audit complete. 10 pages, 37 entities examined. 3 RELEASE defects (wrong-script CJK characters in zh fields on p238/p241) and 1 semantic drift (p238::3 uses 役割 vs 要件). 5 WARN findings (inconsistent terminology, missing entity export, mixed-script surface). All EN translations semantically accurate. JP definitions accurate. Main defect cluster: Japanese-script characters leaking into Simplified Chinese fields.
